features.name: Vendor profiles
features.description: Supplier contact information, account numbers, notes, preferred vendor designation, purchase history, and performance tracking.

features.name: Vendor connection management
features.description: Connection setup, secure credential handling, account grouping, connection status, re-authentication, and onboarding wizard.

features.name: Vendor intelligence
features.description: Availability tracking, new and discontinued product alerts, pricing change monitoring, lead times, and vendor comparison tools.

features.name: Product import
features.description: Single, bulk, category, collection, scheduled, and synchronized product import.

features.name: Product data collection
features.description: Names, descriptions, images, specifications, SKUs, UPCs, weight, dimensions, documents, guides, and warranty information.

features.name: Product lifecycle management
features.description: Editing, duplication, archiving, version history, tagging, categorization, and merging.

features.name: Service import
features.description: Supplier service offerings, pricing tables, descriptions, requirements, and turnaround times.

features.name: Supported service catalog
features.description: Screen printing, DTF, embroidery, heat press, laser engraving, graphic design, packaging, kitting, warehousing, freight, installation, assembly, and production services.

features.name: Service management
features.description: Categorization, version tracking, vendor-specific services, availability tracking, and documentation storage.

features.name: Centralized repository
features.description: Products, services, bundles, production recipes, and catalog assets.

features.name: Organization tools
features.description: Categories, subcategories, brands, tags, collections, project folders, and saved views.

features.name: Search and discovery
features.description: Universal search, vendor search, service search, product search, AI-powered search, and smart filtering.

features.name: Asset maintenance
features.description: Review, archive, merge, update, and curate assets for resale use.

features.name: Product and service pricing rules
features.description: Fixed, percentage, cost-plus, margin-based, category, vendor, tier, quantity break, labor, and hourly pricing.

features.name: Advanced pricing
features.description: Customer-specific, group, wholesale, retail, promotional, and contract pricing.

features.name: Cost breakdown engine
features.description: Track product, service, labor, shipping, packaging, setup, installation, and related job costs.

features.name: Margin management
features.description: Gross margin calculations, forecasting, optimization, alerts, low-margin detection, minimum profit thresholds, and approval workflows.

features.name: Bundle builder
features.description: Combine products, services, labor, packaging, shipping, setup fees, and installation into reusable offerings.

features.name: Production recipe builder
features.description: Repeatable production formulas with multi-component products, automatic cost calculations, quantity scaling, and dynamic pricing updates.

features.name: Bundle templates
features.description: Reusable configurations for offerings such as blank shirt plus DTF print, hoodie plus embroidery, trophy plus engraving, sign plus installation, or product plus setup service.

features.name: Catalog builder
features.description: Custom, branded, multi-page, product, service, and hybrid catalogs with layouts, cover pages, brand colors, and publishing.

features.name: Price book management
features.description: Customer, industry, project, and team price books with PDF generation, secure sharing, online access, versioning, and expiration controls.

features.name: Quote builder
features.description: Generate quotes from products, services, bundles, and production recipes.

features.name: Proposal builder
features.description: Branded proposals, product and service recommendations, supporting documents, and electronic approvals.

features.name: Quote tracking
features.description: Draft, sent, accepted, rejected, and revision history states.

feature_groups.name: Customer, Automation, AI, Integrations, And Enterprise Expansion

features.name: Customer management
features.description: Profiles, contacts, groups, notes, purchase history, custom pricing, portals, favorites, and quote requests.

features.name: Automation and notifications
features.description: Scheduled imports, product and service synchronization, vendor monitoring, price change alerts, inventory alerts, margin alerts, and approvals.

features.name: AI assistants and natural language search
features.description: Product, service, pricing, catalog, and quote assistance for summaries, categorization, attribute extraction, suggested markups, recommendations, and natural language queries.

features.name: Analytics, integrations, collaboration, and enterprise
features.description: Financial, vendor, catalog, and quote reporting; ecommerce, CRM, accounting, and storage integrations; multi-user collaboration; SSO, MFA, audit logging, retention, and compliance reporting.

feature_relationships.relationship: Imported products populate the unified asset library.
Imported services populate the unified asset library.
Bundles depend on complete component cost breakdowns.
Quote builder can include bundles and production recipes.
Margin rules can trigger alerts and approvals.
